description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Static Analyzers that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs, clang_format and cmake_format, both running on ubuntu-18.04. The clang_format job should install clang-format 10, set it as the default, and then run a script to check commit format. The cmake_format job should set up Python 3.x, install cmake-format, and then run a script to check cmake format.
